name: image-api-tool
description: Prompt-driven staged image edits tool with safety gates and reproducible run logs.

scripts.backend:user:local: cd src-tauri && cargo run -- db:ensure-user --username local --display-name "Local User"
scripts.realesrgan:setup: cd src-tauri && cargo run -- tools:install realesrgan-ncnn
scripts.realesrgan:python:setup: echo 'DEPRECATED: Use Rust CLI commands instead'
scripts.rembg:setup: echo 'DEPRECATED: Use Rust CLI commands instead'
scripts.tools:setup: cd src-tauri && cargo run -- tools:install all
